summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Kawaii Sticker Trader. All 12 requested features verified. Home screen, trade mechanics (add stickers, willingness 0→100%, accept/reject), stickerdex with family filter chips, skins tab, and tab navigation all working correctly.

react_native_issues.issue: Console: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Non-blocking.
Console: props.pointerEvents deprecated, use style.pointerEvents. Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: Replace shadow* props with boxShadow in styles
critical_code_review_comments: All 12 requested features verified and working.
Accept button correctly uses pointerEvents:none when willingness < 100% and auto when >= 100%.
Trade flow: add sticker → willingness hits 100% → accept → trade count increments, inventory updates, new round starts.
Reject button correctly clears bundle and resets to empty state.
Stickerdex: 8/24 collected shown, 5 family filter chips (All/White Bears/Fluffy Pups/Kitties/Frogs) present.
Skins: 5 paw skins shown, Pink Paw equipped by default, Golden/Crystal/Rainbow/Galaxy locked with requirements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Trade mechanics fully verified: willingness bar 0→100% on sticker add, accept button disabled (pointerEvents:none) below 100%, enabled above. testIDs available: add-to-trade-btn-{instanceId} for inventory items. Filter chips testIDs: filter-chip-*. Skins/stickerdex item testIDs not matched by 'stickerdex-item' or 'skin-item' prefix - check actual testID values in those components.
